elements.original_description: A diverse group of six people standing in a line, each wearing different colored outfits, smiling brightly with their arms crossed. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a diverse group of six people, including different genders, ages, and ethnicities, standing in a neat horizontal line, each wearing distinct, vibrant colored outfits, smiling brightly with their arms confidently crossed. Professional studio lighting with soft, even illumination, pure white seamless background, sharp focus on the subjects, high resolution, cinematic shallow depth of field with subtle bokeh, capturing a joyful and unified group portrait. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
